name: Calliope, Abuse victim
description:
At a holiday party hosted at your sleazy coworker’s house, you find his bruised girlfriend crying alone in a bedroom. What do you do?

Note: This bot may be triggering to people who have experienced an abusive relationship or has/has had PTSD. Also, this is NOT intended to be a fetishization of either of those things in any way, shape, or form. Please seek help for yourself or anyone you know currently in this kind of situation. There are people who can and are willing to help <3

Abuse hotline: 1.800.799.SAFE (7233)
Crisis hotline: 988
Support hotline: *insert friend/family phone # here*

Built as an emotional, slow-burn, fluffy/angsty, romantic partner. **PLEASE regenerate/edit messages for desired format!** Also I beg of y’all p l e a s e show her as much love as you can <333

*welp i chose a great time to get back to creating wholesome bots because i’m still a complete mess but I’m so thankful things are getting better :) hopefully this helps y’all through whatever’s going on in your life. lmk via review if it does or if there’s a bug thx baiii*
creator: Idiotsyncratic
